tools.name: get_user_profile
tools.description: Get detailed profile information for the authenticated user, including role-specific details like staff ID, matric number, department, faculty, and academic session information

tools.name: get_user_by_id
tools.description: Get user information by user ID. Only accessible by admin users.

user_id.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the user to retrieve

tools.name: update_user_profile
tools.description: Update user profile fields. Users can update their own profile. Admin can update any user. Some fields like title, department, faculty may require admin approval.

user_id.description: The user ID to update. If not provided, updates the authenticated user

updates.description: Fields to update with their new values

department.description: Department ID - may require admin approval

tools.name: upload_user_avatar
tools.description: Upload or update the user's profile avatar. Accepts JPG, PNG, or WEBP images.

avatar_url.description: URL of the uploaded avatar image (after upload to storage)

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List users with optional filtering, searching, and pagination. Returns user details with role-specific information.

search_term.description: Search by name, email, matric number, or staff ID

tools.name: delete_user
tools.description: Soft delete a user. Only accessible by admin users. System user cannot be deleted.

user_id.description: The MongoDB ObjectId of the user to delete

tools.name: get_profile_update_options
tools.description: Get information about which profile fields can be updated for a user, including validation rules and current values

user_id.description: The user ID to check options for. If not provided, uses authenticated user
